name: RedPoint Global
description: RedPoint Global — Customer data platform with real-time decisioning and omnichannel marketing orchestration.

seo.title: RedPoint Global — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: RedPoint Global: RedPoint Global — Customer data platform with real-time decisioning and omnichannel marketing orchestration.

when_to_use: Customer data unification for enterprise CDP use case
Decisioning engine for personalized cross-channel offers
Journey orchestration across email, SMS, and paid media
Identity resolution for first-party data activation

pros: Strong data quality and identity resolution
cons: UI and UX feel legacy compared to modern CDPs
review.verdict: Mature enterprise CDP for regulated omnichannel marketers; dated feel, but capable at scale.
review.best_for: Enterprise marketers in banking, insurance, or healthcare needing real-time omnichannel decisioning.
review.not_for: Product-led SaaS, startups, or teams wanting modern composable CDP UX.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
